source_pr.title: telemetry: fix panic caused by assign nil map
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Problem Summary:

1. query Prometheus with ErrPrometheusAddrIsNotSet may return nil value, so it will panic for non-Prometheus cluster
2. didn't init `lastSQBInfo` and `currentSQBInfo` success, so it may `assignment to entry in nil map` and miss unlock `slowQueryLock` in Prometheus included clustered

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed, How it Works:

tiny fix for those two problems

### Related changes

- n/a

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)

Side effects

- n/a

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note.<!-- Please write a release note here to describe the change you made when it is released to the users of TiDB. If your PR doesn't involve any change to TiDB(like test enhancements, RFC proposals...), you can write `No release note`. -->
